steps.title: Power On
steps.instruction: Press the power button on the top-left control panel to turn on the printer.

steps.title: Check Ink Levels
steps.instruction: Visually inspect the front-facing ink tanks to ensure sufficient ink level before printing.

steps.title: Prepare Output Tray
steps.instruction: Pull out the paper output tray from the bottom front slot to catch printed pages.

result.object_summary: An all-in-one color inkjet printer featuring integrated front-facing ink tanks.
